title: Add decision_function to GradientBoosting / HistGradientBoosting / AdaBoost classifiers
description:
Returns the raw (pre-softmax / pre-sign) score for each sample, used as input to ROC-AUC and as a calibration source. sklearn GradientBoostingClassifier and HistGradientBoostingClassifier expose decision_function(X) returning shape (n_samples,) for binary or (n_samples, n_classes) for multi-class. AdaBoostClassifier exposes the same.

For GB/HGB: return the cumulative raw scores before the link function.
For AdaBoost (SAMME): return the weighted sum of estimator votes.
